notes: v1.14.81 - Browsable Ghost Echo quirk corpus (roadmap P1, final item): a 'Browse Quirks' button in the Ghost Echo sheet opens a searchable list of ALL captured quirks (own outgoing + imported incoming, newest first, PEER badge on imported) - so a tech can proactively read the team's accumulated gotchas instead of only seeing them reactively on a matching rack+phase. Inline-styled overlay matching the capture modal; live text search across hardware/phase/text; no new CSS. Completes the Ghost Echo quirk loop (capture -> portable -> browsable).
